name: scaffold_module
description: Generate a new SwissAgent capability module skeleton from a name and description. Creates module.json, tools.json, and Python source stubs so the agent can implement the logic immediately.

tools.description: Optional list of tool descriptors ({name, description, arguments}) to generate. Defaults to a single stub tool.

name: scaffold_plugin
description: Generate a new SwissAgent plugin skeleton from a name and description. Creates plugin.json, tools.json, and a Python source stub inside plugins/.

tools.description: Optional list of tool descriptors to scaffold.

name: scaffold_tests
description: Generate a pytest test skeleton for an existing module or plugin. Reads tools.json to discover all tools and writes one stub test per tool.

module_name.description: Name of the module or plugin to generate tests for

output_path.description: Where to write the test file (defaults to tests/test_{module}.py)
